statement: Local cache — Use local user cache to protect unsaved work during disconnection, accidental close, — Affects browser storage layer, version/user-specific draft key, restore
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User has safety if connection fails or browser
